name: Multiple Failed Logins
summary: YARA-L style rule Multiple_Failed_Logins triggers when one user has more than five failed login attempts from the same source IP within two minutes.
rule_code:
rule Multiple_Failed_Logins {
  meta:
    title = "Multiple Failed Logins"
    id = "CYBERSIM-AUTH-0001"
    status = "experimental"
    description = "Detects repeated failed VPN login attempts for the same user and source IP"
    author = "CyberSim SOC"
    date = "2026-05-02"
    mitre = "T1110"
    severity = "high"
  events:
    $e.action = "login_attempt"
    $e.status = "failed"
    $e.user = $user
    $e.source_ip = $source_ip
  match:
    $user, $source_ip over 2m
  condition:
    #e > 5
}

name: Cracked Software Download
summary: YARA rule Cracked_Software_Download triggers when cracked software filenames or known malicious SHA-256 indicators are detected.
rule_code:
rule Cracked_Software_Download {
  meta:
    title = "Cracked Games and Office Crack Download"
    id = "CYBERSIM-MAL-0001"
    status = "experimental"
    description = "Detects cracked game and Office activator downloads by filename and known malicious SHA-256 values"
    author = "CyberSim SOC"
    date = "2026-05-02"
    mitre = "T1204"
    severity = "high"
  strings:
    $crack = "crack" nocase wide ascii
    $game = "game" nocase wide ascii
    $office = "office" nocase wide ascii
    $kmsauto = "KMSAuto" nocase wide ascii
    $hash_gamehack = "ba80c6caa66fd19d21c1d2d2883173c88df22352761e775106e5dc9d0fa33144" nocase ascii
    $hash_kmsauto = "3c56387a047564ab68443d8c2f9f427933d5caa09354b60ebf1879a3f3862ceb" nocase ascii
  condition:
    any of ($hash_*) or ($crack and ($game or $office or $kmsauto))
}

name: Password File Opened
summary: YARA rule Credential_File_Opened triggers when a scanned filename or file content contains English password indicators or the French phrase mot de passe.
rule_code:
rule Credential_File_Opened {
  meta:
    title = "Password File Opened"
    id = "CYBERSIM-CRED-0001"
    status = "experimental"
    description = "Detects files likely storing passwords using English and French password terms"
    author = "CyberSim SOC"
    date = "2026-05-02"
    mitre = "T1552.001"
    kill_chain_phase = "Credential Access"
    severity = "high"
  strings:
    $filename_password = /(?i)(^|[\\\/_. -])passwords?([\\\/_. -]|$)/
    $filename_mot_de_passe = /(?i)(^|[\\\/_. -])mot[ _.-]?de[ _.-]?passe([\\\/_. -]|$)/
    $content_password = "password" nocase wide ascii
    $content_mot_de_passe = "mot de passe" nocase wide ascii
  condition:
    any of them
}

name: Suspicious PowerShell Encoded Command
summary: YARA rule Suspicious_PowerShell_EncodedCommand triggers when PowerShell command content contains encoded-command execution indicators.
rule_code:
rule Suspicious_PowerShell_EncodedCommand {
  meta:
    title = "Suspicious PowerShell Execution"
    id = "CYBERSIM-PS-0001"
    status = "experimental"
    description = "Detects PowerShell encoded-command execution commonly used for script obfuscation"
    author = "CyberSim SOC"
    date = "2026-05-02"
    mitre = "T1059"
    severity = "medium"
  strings:
    $powershell = "powershell.exe" nocase wide ascii
    $encoded_full = "-EncodedCommand" nocase wide ascii
    $encoded_short = " -enc " nocase wide ascii
    $nop = "-NoP" nocase wide ascii
  condition:
    $powershell and any of ($encoded_*)
}
